job.title: IT Sales Executive
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Move2Cloud Tunisia is looking for an IT Sales Executive to develop its client portfolio in Tunisia and France. You will be the ambassador of our Cloud & DevOps offerings to CIOs and business directors.
mission.1: Prospect new clients (SMBs, mid-market companies, and large accounts) in Tunisia and France
mission.2: Identify client needs and build tailored commercial proposals
mission.3: Lead the full sales cycle: qualification, demo, negotiation, closing
mission.4: Manage and retain the existing client portfolio
mission.5: Collaborate with technical teams to write proposals
mission.6: Participate in industry events and IT trade shows
mission.7: Achieve and exceed quarterly revenue targets
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in sales, management, or computer science
profile.2: 2 to 5 years of experience in IT services or consulting sales
profile.3: Fluent French and strong oral presentation skills
profile.4: Knowledge of the cloud / IT services sector is a plus
profile.5: Autonomy, tenacity, and strong results orientation
